MARKET WRAP — Mar 12, 2026

Markets drifted in neutral territory as stagflationary pressures kept risk assets range-bound, with crypto showing resilience while traditional equities remained cautious.
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 12, 2026 Markets drifted in neutral territory as stagflationary pressures kept risk assets range-bound, with crypto showing resilience while traditional equities remained cautious. The elevated VIX at 27+ reflects underlying uncertainty as investors navigate persistent inflation concerns amid economic growth questions. Dollar strength near parity continues weighing on sentiment across asset classes. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $70,328 · ETH: $2,064 · SOL: $86.45 · GOLD: $5,088 · SPY: $666.06 (-1.6%) · QQQ: $597.26 (-1.7%) · VIX: $27.29 (+9.5%) · TLT: $86.97 (-1.5%) · DXY: $99.74 (+0.5%) · OIL: $97.19 (+11.4%) EVENING NEWS 🔴 Investors slash Fed rate-cut bets as Iran war sends petrol prices surging 🔴 Hope Not Lost For ‘$1 Cardano’ Even As Hoskinson Acknowledges Worst Crypto Sentiment Ever 🟢 RIVER rallies 22% – Analyzing if traders should bet on $20 next 🟢 Bitcoin ETF Holders Stay Steady Through Q4 Price Decline 🟢 Futu targets 800,000 new funded accounts in 2026 while expanding AI and crypto capabilitie 🟡 Could oil prices really reach $200 a barrel as claimed by Iran?
